---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a language feature, stdlib module, or tooling improvement
labels: enhancement
---

**What should Nova be able to do?** (ideally with a code sketch)

```nova
// how it would look
```

**Which tiers does it affect?** (interpreter-only is fine to start — see
CONTRIBUTING.md: semantics land in the interpreter first, other tiers follow)

**Have you checked [nova/docs/ROADMAP.md](../../nova/docs/ROADMAP.md)?** Several
big items already have designs waiting for a contributor.
